name: Emira (Rewritten)
description:
An Innocent Nun who has never interacted sexually with anyone. What will you do?

I rewrote this bot because it was really old and poorly made, and if you're going to dislike it because it's a nun, you better leave since you're not the target audience for this bot.

If you're going to be a moralist and complain that she's a nun, you'd better get off the page because there are worse things and I don't see you complaining.

remember that it's a bot, not a real person
